transcript.clean_text: the last week of the gerald italia almost ready to go the second week closed out with stage 14 and 15 stage 14 around turin won by simon yates behind there was all sorts of action one of the stages of the year richard carapaz pulled on the pink jersey several gc contenders lost their chances the race would then move to stage 15 into the valdosta the sun not quite shining as strongly metaphoric clouds hanging over the gc challenges of others and 170 odd kilometers with four and a bit thousand meters left to climb rival or cannabis in piedmont was the start before the riders moved into the valdosta a bordering region of switzerland and france mighty mountains above the riders three of which they had to climb pila le fleur would be the first first category climb followed by veronica and then a long drag 22 kilometers the second category climbed to kanye where the stage would finish it was a strange old start to the day as well the flag was waved took a few k's for the first attacks to go when they did come there was a big crash that involved the race leader as well took a while before richard carapaz could get back on into the bunch but he do so relatively unscathed almost 100 kilometers before the break was allowed to go almost 30 riders were in it when it did go and then they had to start taking on the climbs nobody really threatening in the general classification managed to make their way in it so be the ineos grenadiers who control rather calmly behind and up front they'd start to fight it out very early for the stage win kuhn balman hitting out on the first of the three classified ascents he came over the first of the climbs in first position and that meant he'd take the mountains classification lead machiavelli would set off in search of him followed by martin tusfeld and we had three dutch riders at the front with a lead of just over a minute on to the climb to vedania the hardest of the day and that's where giulio chicorni started his ascent i sent up the climb and i sent up the leaderboard as well because he was soon to within 15 seconds of the three up the road kun balman was already being dropped out the back she cornet then started to shed the dead wood santiago bui trago was close to him and looking good trusfeld would stay there for a while recosta making his way forward antonio pedrero on his way to the front too by this time hugh kathy had been dropped but he too was starting to fight his way back to the front showing real grit and determination just over 40 kilometers to go and gilmarton would also try his luck from the peloton he lost quite a bit of time after being in the top five he was on his way into the top ten gaining another couple of minutes by the end of the day mccarthy made contact and there were four at the front that just before they went over the top of the penultimate climb of the day the frenchman mata was continuing his own adventure the gc favorites not worrying about his presence by this time a minute in front time to descend and by the end of the descent there'll be six riders at the front of the race kostat and tusfeld making contact once again just over 25 kilometers to go mata continuing to hover just about a minute in front of the gc group giulio chicorni was not waiting the steeper slopes at the bottom of the final 22 kilometer climb came at the beginning he used those to his advantage splitting the group in half first then leaving behind both karthi and hui trago another big effort and the gap began to grow in the bunch not much was happening in your scenarios using their energy or what was left of it everybody looking tired chicony continuing to go his gap a minute and one second to bui trago just over 10 k's from the finish karthi dropped by the colombian and pedrero advancing as well but it was all about giulio chicorni a difficult few years like it has been for everybody unable to find the level in the last two or three seasons he certainly found it here a third zero stage win but a first victory in any bike race since before the pandemic behind martha would take around two minutes back on his tc rivals and move into that top ten but all the glory on the day going to giuliochi cornet and after losing the jersey trek segafredo finally took their stage win so ten days in pink for juanpe lopez a stage win for giulio chicony with trago second pedrero third karthi and tusfeld in the top five behind this is what happened the gc group coming to the line and richard carapaz leading the giro d'italia going into the final week with guillermo marta sneaking into that top 10. the first mountains in the alps taken on plenty more to come starting with a big mountain stage on tuesday before the rest day though time to celebrate for italy three stage wins in six days in the middle week they were worried after the first nine days they're really looking good now the italians so stage 16 leaves salo early in the morning and heads up some mighty climbs goleta de cadino to start us off then they head to adolo and that can only mean one thing the passo del mortirolo into the next valley of the valley santa cristina and a short descent and ascent the final kso into africa 202 kilometers this will be one of the hardest stages of the agility italia and you'll be able to watch it live or on demand it'll be on gcn plus discovery plus and eurosport we look forward to your company then you
